ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bioprojects" (
  "bioproject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bioproject */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bioproject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bioproject */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the bioproject */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Update date of the bioproject */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., research, clinical, etc.) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* Name or ID of the project leader */,
  "project_team" TEXT /* List of team members or IDs */,
  "project_publication" TEXT /* Associated publications or links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bioproject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biosamples" (
  "biosample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biosample */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the biosample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biosample */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the biosample */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the biosample */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., environmental, clinical, lab) */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used for sample preparation */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biosample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wgsmasters" (
  "wgs_master_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WGS master */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the WGS master */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WGS master */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the WGS master */,
  "wgs_version" TEXT /* Version of the WGS master */,
  "wgs_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the WGS master */,
  "wgs_quality" TEXT /* Quality score or metric for the WGS master */,
  "wgs_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the WGS master */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wgs_master_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomies" (
  "taxid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomy */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the taxonomy */,
  "parent_taxid" INTEGER /* Parent taxonomy ID of the taxonomy */,
  "parent_rank" TEXT /* Parent rank of the taxonomy */,
  "taxon_lineage" TEXT /* Full lineage of the taxonomy */,
  "taxon_synonyms" TEXT /* Synonyms for the taxonomy */,
  "taxon_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the taxonomy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxid")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "infraspecific_name" TEXT /* Infraspecific name of the organism */,
  "isolate" TEXT /* Isolate of the organism */,
  "taxid" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID of the organism */,
  "organism_strain" TEXT /* Strain of the organism */,
  "organism_serotype" TEXT /* Serotype of the organism */,
  "organism_pathogenicity" TEXT /* Information about the pathogenicity of the organism */,
  "organism_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organisms_taxid FOREIGN KEY ("taxid") REFERENCES taxonomies ("taxid")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Version status of the version */,
  "assembly_level" TEXT /* Assembly level of the version */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Release type of the version */,
  "genome_rep" TEXT /* Genome representation of the version */,
  "seq_rel_date" TEXT /* Sequence release date of the version */,
  "asm_name" TEXT /* Assembly name of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Log of changes made in the version */,
  "version_contributors" TEXT /* List of contributors or IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_centers" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the submission center */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission center */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute of the submission center */,
  "center_type" TEXT /* Type of the submission center (e.g., sequencing, annotation) */,
  "center_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the center */,
  "center_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the center */,
  "center_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gbrs_paired_assemblies" (
  "gbrs_paired_asm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Gbrs paired assembly */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the Gbrs paired assembly */,
  "paired_asm_comp" TEXT /* Paired assembly composition of the Gbrs paired assembly */,
  "gbrs_accession" TEXT /* Gbrs accession number of the Gbrs paired assembly */,
  "pairing_method" TEXT /* Method used for pairing the assemblies */,
  "pairing_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pairing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gbrs_paired_asm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ftp_paths" (
  "ftp_path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FTP path */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the FTP path */,
  "ftp_path" TEXT /* FTP path of the FTP path */,
  "local_filename" TEXT /* Local filename of the FTP path */,
  "path_type" TEXT /* Type of the FTP path (e.g., public, private) */,
  "path_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the FTP path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ftp_path_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_files" (
  "assembly_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly file */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the assembly file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the assembly file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the assembly file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the assembly file in bytes */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 checksum of the assembly file for integrity verification */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_stats" (
  "assembly_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly stat */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the assembly stat */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly stat */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the assembly stat */,
  "stat_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Assembly ID of the access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the access log */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access log */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of the access log */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "log_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
